description: Drive a WLED LED strip from video content playing in Jellyfin
name: WLED TV
overview: Samples pixel colours along the edges of the playing video and sends them to a WLED controller in real time, creating an immersive edge-lighting effect that reacts to the content on screen.

versions.changelog:
Initial release

Samples pixel colours along screen edges during Jellyfin playback and drives a WLED LED strip in real time.

**Setup:**
- Install the JavaScript Injector plugin
- Configure the WLED controller URL, LED counts, and strip start position in the WLED TV admin page
